title: The War Has Ended And Capital Will Rotate Out Of US Assets
text:
The War Has Ended And Capital Will Rotate Out Of US Assets

Anatole Kaletsky

Gavekal Research | 16 Jun 2026

It is well known that the first casualty of war is truth (and bonds are usually a close second!). As such, investors could only assume that every market-moving statement from any of the main belligerents in the Iran-Israel-US war that started on February 28 was possibly a lie. In turn, this meant that every financial market in the world was possibly trading at “false prices,” making rational investment analysis very challenging. This situation has now completely changed.The ceasefire deal signed yesterday by US vice president JD Vance and Iran’s parliamentary speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf has been dismissed by most media and market commentators as little more than an “agreement to disagree,” with all the important questions unanswered and the root causes of the conflict unresolved.
